name: Tederic Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Tederic Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells professional injection molding machine (IMM) products worldwide. The company offers toggle type, two-platen, full electric type, and multicolor IMM production lines, as well as related components. Its products have applications in auto parts, home appliances, logistics, industrial and civil products, utility tunnel and pipe fitting, electronics and office automation, and food and medicine package industries. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
